programme.desc: Today we are visiting the Windsurfers paradise which is why the Freestyle Pro Tour is visiting it every year for its biggest event of the season. This will be the first ever FPT event that runs all three Freestyle windsurfing disciplines at the same time.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 WOF 2024 #33: Qatar Airways GKA - Best of Big Air Kite World Championships
programme.desc: Welcome to the Qatar Airways GKA Bite Big Air World Tour! This thrilling season takes us to two breathtaking locations: the vibrant coastal town of Barcarès, France, and the stunning shores of Salinas de Tenefé in Spain. Get ready for the world's top kiteboarders!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E35 WOF 2024 #35: Motosurf World Championship - Båstad (SWE)
programme.desc: Set against the stunning backdrop of the Swedish coastline, the world’s best motosurfers are ready to go head-to-head. Speed, skill, and pure passion - these are the ingredients for thrilling races on the water. Who will claim the title here in Båstad?

programme.title: LINE OF SIGHT | A Look into Wingsuit BASE Jumping
programme.desc: The golden age of wingsuiting is upon us. Through evolving suit technology the initial inflation time has gone down, which has lead to quicker starts and more exits. Wingsuit athletes Marshal Miller, Jesse Hall, and Sean Chuma take you through the iconic jumps.

programme.title: THE RIO CAQUETA
programme.desc: Jules Domine and Tyler Bradt, obsessed and addicted to whitewater adventure, make a plan to journey the long way, from the source of Rio Caqueta 1,000 Kilometers downstream to an unreal big water canyon deep in the Colombian Amazon.

programme.title: A Plea For Refuge
programme.desc: Two adventurous friends, Jeff Shapiro and Cody Tuttle, have a desire to experience one of the last, raw, and truly preserved wilderness areas on the North American continent, attempt to hike and fly paraglider's across the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge in Alaska.

programme.title: BACK TO NORMAL
programme.desc: For Ian Mitchard jumping out of airplanes and soaring above the earth with a nylon canopy is as normal as walking through the grocery store. But when a dramatic accident put the lifestyle he loves in jeopardy, Ian is forced to grapple with his body.

programme.title: GKA Freestyle Kite World Cup Taiba 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: From November 12th to 15th, the world’s best freestyle kiteboarders will gather in Taíba, Brazil, for the thrilling final stop of the GKA Kite World Tour 2025. Taíba’s golden beaches and steady winds will once again set the stage for an action-packed showdown.

programme.title: GKA Hydrofoil Big Air World Cup Abu Dhabi 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: Abu Dhabi will host the GKA Kite World Tour for the first time, bringing back-to-back World Cups in Hydrofoil Big Air and Freestyle to Fahid Island, Abu Dhabi’s newest coastal wellness destination and the world’s first Fitwel-certified island, offering 11kms of coastline. From 25 to 30 October, the world’s top kiteboarders will take to Fahid Island’s pristine waters in a six-day spectacle of high-flying action, part of the Fahid Island Watersports Festival – a nine-day celebration that will also feature the season finale of the GWA Wingfoil World Tour and the championship deciders of the SFT Surf Foil World Tour. In Hydrofoil Big Air, the battle for the world title is a close-run thing....

programme.sub-title: S01 : E47 WOF 2024 #47: Engadin Skimarathon

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E35 WOF 2024 #35: Motosurf World Championship - Båstad (SWE)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E12 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 12, Bosnia
programme.desc: it’s been a long time since the world series held a championship here in Sarajevo. Let’s see what test of strength this destination holds for our athletes. And what fantastic athletes are here again in Stage 12 of the SCL World Series. The strongman champions league Bosnia is another iconic Strongman event with the return of Rongo Keen from Australia and Portugal winner 2022 George Sulaiman.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E13 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 13, Romania
programme.desc: Welcome to Sibiu in Romania. It’s an important day for some of these athletes, because four of them have a real chance of getting into our all-exclusive world finals. There’s only one more stage after this to get those all-important extra points. So, there’s going to be some fireworks, who will take the title here and who will qualify for the World Finals?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E14 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 14, Gibraltar
programme.desc: This is it the last show before the world final. These guys have really got to fight for the points now, this is going to be action packed, whilst these guys fight it out all day.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E15 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 15, Turkey Part 1
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkey’s south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season of Strongman Champions League. Here in the sunshine, we’ll finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is. You could not ask for a better setting. After months of hard-work, if not years for some of these lads, we find out who will take the world title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E16 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 16, Turkey Part 1
programme.desc: Welcome, to day two of the strongman champions league 2022 finals here in Alanya, Turkey. It’s all up for grabs now, everyone is fighting for the world title belt. This is an epic episode where we finally crown the World champion of 2022.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E01 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 1 - Finland
programme.desc: Welcome to the 2023 Strongman Champions League in Vaasa, Finland! This year’s event introduces a knockout format with 6 intense events over 90 minutes, ending in a unique deadlift face-off with boats.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E02 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 2 - Serbia
programme.desc: Stage 2 of the Strongman Champions League 2023 is set in Zrenjanin, Serbia. This exciting event features 5 challenging contests, including a superhuman Yoke race. As the SCL World Series Tour continues, athletes will battle it out to claim the yellow leader’s position for the season. Don’t miss this incredible stage of strength and endurance!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E03 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3 - Finland Teams World
programme.desc: The World’s Strongest Team will be crowned in this edition of SCL, here in Kalajoki-Finland we’ve picked some of the best in the business, teamed them up, and they’ll be going all out against each other. It’s now no longer about being a lonely wolf, but more about the pack mentality. It is a competition over 7 events, including a Big 2-man Log lift and heavy deadlift. Let’s start the action.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E04 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 4 - Holland
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League in Holland at the Dru Factory in ULFT. A great location for a spectacular battle with 14 Athletes over 3 events! The first 3 events in this episode are Truckpull/ Superyoke and Farmerswalk, with 2 massive logs of 150 kg in their hands. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it’s the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E05 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 5 - Holland 2023
programme.desc: Ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, strongman fans across the world, we are back for SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it’s about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland, continues with the last 3 events, here at the Dru Factory in ULFT. The events in this episode are the Viking Press, Wheel Flip and the Atlas Stones, with 180 kg in the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E06 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the World’s Strongest Latino competition has begun. This two-day event in Porto, Portugal, features 20 athletes from around the world competing in 8 events. After 4 grueling events, the top 12 will advance to the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E07 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7 - Finland World Record Breakers
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League World Record Breakers 2023 starts with a 25-ton snow plow! Crazy machines are pulled and pushed, with many kilograms moved. A few new world records are set in this competition.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E08 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 8 - Portugal
programme.desc: We have returned to the powerhouse of Portugal for an edge-of-your-seat galactic battle. If all the planets collided at once, it wouldn’t compare to the bang of this show. Get ready for the battle of the beasts; it’s the heaviest show in the universe, the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E09 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 9 - England
programme.desc: SCL UK has landed in Gloucester it is workout war fitness for the ferocious, it’s going to be a a battle of the brutal, a rampage of the roofless. This is going to be a massacre of the muscles. You know it by now, but just in case you don’t, this is strongman champions league.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E10 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 10 - World's Strongest Viking
programme.desc: On the menu this week it’s medieval madness, we’ve come back to the middle ages to test our noble men through a muscle gaining of events. They are hoping and we are hoping that one will survive to take the title of the world’s strongest Viking. The official World's Strongest Viking is this time in Finland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E11 Stage 11 - SCL Poland 2023
programme.desc: This week is a good one, can you feel the energy? Sit still, just look at me and try and feel the energy, because I can tell you, the atmosphere here is electric, it’s explosive, there is a pure elemental force going through these athletes' veins. I’m shaking because it’s Poland, it’s powerful, it’s strongman champions league, and you know what I'm going to say, get ready because it’s about to get heavy.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E12 Stage 12 - SCL Poland 2023
programme.desc: SCL Poland part 2 - Who will win the title in Poland and take 25 points for the world ranking. It is very exciting on the top, in part 1 between Poland and Latvia. Another great episode with super strongman events such as: Bag Toss Medley, Log Lift Reps and the Powerstairs. Also an interview with Mateusz Kieloszkowski, the all time favorite champion from Poland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E13 Stage 13 - SCL Cyprus 2023
programme.desc: It’s time to show our strength and gain respect from the gods of Olympus. Our gladiators have many events set out by no other than Hercules himself. The coliseum is ready here on this mythological island of Cyprus, so we have landed in Limassol were again 12 Top Strongmen are battling for the title and ranking points.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E14 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 14 - South Africa
programme.desc: The only and official world championship Truckpulling for its 10th year, again at the Strongman Champions league. With the 3 times Worldchampion Kelvin de Ruiter – defending his title. This championship has trucks in all shapes and sizes which is a lot like our athletes, there all different pay loads, but does the biggest win or is it the strongest.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E15 Stage 15 - SCL World Finals Bosnia
programme.desc: Years and years of determination has brought us here today, when all the walls felt like they were caving in perseverance. When their bodies were screaming, hurting, shouting stop, beneath. These are the things which make up a man, these are the things that bring you world finalists. This episode they fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E16 Stage 16 - SCL World Finals Bosnia
programme.desc: Part 2 of the World Finals of the Strongman Champions League tour 2023 at the Sarajevo Centar Skenderija in Bosnia. 3 Events was done already and amazing results have been set. Who will be the new World champion? Find out here, who, after 16 stages, will be crowned World Champion 2023.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E01 Stage 1 - FINLAND – ICEMAN
programme.desc: After 10 years there is another edition of THE ICEMAN in minus 25 degrees and snow, and it is also the first stage in the MLO Strongman Champions League. With a new World champion from South Africa, Rayno Nel, it will be a challenging year for all the athletes to win the title again after 1 full year. But now they can win one very exceptional title, which is the SCL ICEMAN!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E02 Stage 2 - MARTINIQUE - 2024
programme.desc: A battle in the beautiful Caribbean Islands. Over 2 days and more than 10,000 spectators expected like previous editions. The cold temperature from the Iceman is changed in 35 degrees hot Martinique. Watch who gets the title in Martinique, events include: Truck Pull, Deadlift, Hercules Hold, Log Lift, and Arm Over Arm Pull.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E03 Stage 3 - HUNGARY - 2024
programme.desc: The SCL Hungary this year is in the AQUAPARK in Budapest, Stage 3 from the spectacular MLO Strongman Champions League, World is Biggest Pro League. With five great events, such as: Viking Press, Farmer's Walk, Deadlift, Conan's Wheel, and A loading race with Beer barrels of 200 Kg. It is a must see!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E04 Stage 4 - SERBIA - 2024
programme.desc: We're in Zrenjanin, Serbia, again a fantastic stage in the SCL WORLD SERIES TOUR 2024, five events including a super human Yoke race. Who will be the yellow leader for the coming season and take the title with 25 championship points?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E05 Stage 5 - HOLLAND - 2024 - Part 1
programme.desc: We're in Groenlo, east of Holland With the new Talent from South Africa and 2025 Strongest Man of the World - Rayno Nel. The first 3 events are Truckpull, Log Lift and Loading race. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it is the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E06 Stage 6 - HOLLAND - 2024 - Part 2
programme.desc: SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it is about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland , continues with the last 3 events, here at the venue in Groenlo. The events in this episode are the Conan Wheel, Farmers Walk and the Atlas Stones, with a brutal 200kg stone at the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E07 Stage 7 - FINLAND - 2024 - World record breakers
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League: World Record Breakers 2024 kicks off with the Truck Pull, followed by the Front Hold, Frame Carry, Tractor Pull, Shield Carry, Sandbag Toss, and concludes with the intense Loading Race. This two-day competition features all the top strongmen from Finland-and it's one for the history books. Three new world records are shattered, making this a must-see episode for...

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E08 Stage 8 - ESTONIA - 2024
programme.desc: For the first time in over 10 years back in Estonia, in Tartu. 12 of the Strongest athletes in the world will fight here for the title and the overall world championship points. You will see 5 crazy events, such as: Boat Pull, Viking Press, Medley, Conan's Wheel and a very heavy Power Stairs!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E09 Stage 9 - PORTUGAL - 2024
programme.desc: We have returned to Portugal, at the beach of Eposende, to bring you EUROPE'S STRONGEST LATINO. In the beautiful sun of Portugal five cruel events are done in this heat: Truck Pull, Deadlift, Log Lift, Sandbag Toss, Medley.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E10 Stage 10 - POLAND - 2024
programme.desc: A spectacular event on the beach of Gdansk, Poland. A competition in the sand and in the water. Complete with a boat pull. With an impressive line up again, we welcome you to watch us LIVE in the SCL Poland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E11 Stage 11 - DUBAI - 2024 - Part 1
programme.desc: The Strongman Champions League Train stops in Dubai again for the 3rd time, and is now bigger than ever. Hafthor Bjornsson makes his come back here at the SCL DUBAI. You simply cannot miss this most epic show at the World Trade Center in Dubai part 1.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E12 Stage 12 - DUBAI - 2024 - Part 2
programme.desc: After three cruel events in part 1, the World record holder on the deadlift with 501 Kg, will fight for the crown and the title. You simply cant miss this most epic show, at in the World Trade Center in Dubai part 2.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E13 Stage 13 - CYPRUS - 2024
programme.desc: Superhumans arrive in Limassol. Great strongmen from all over the world will compete in the Old Port of Limassol , for the title and championship points. More than ever important this stage, as we come so close to the World Finals in Turkey this year.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E14 Stage 14 - SOUTH AFRICA - 2024
programme.desc: With 12 of the world's best athletes arriving in Cape Town, South Africa, all fighting for the crown and final ranking points ahead of the World Finals in Turkey. Rayno Nel still needs to qualify along with Brian Kichton also battling for a seat in the World Finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E15 Stage 15 - TURKEY - WORLD FINALS - 2024 - PART 1
programme.desc: This episode contestants fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever. Twelve finalists from all over the world are in Turkey and will fight for the ultimate title: WORLD CHAMPION 2024.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E16 Stage 16 - TURKEY - WORLD FINALS - 2024 - PART 2
programme.desc: Part 2 of the world final of the Strongman Champions League tour 2024 in Alanya, Turkey. With three Events down and amazing results. Who will be the new World champion?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 6, Latvia
programme.desc: The SCL is in full swing and the sixth stage takes place in Latvia where the men are eager to break a national record held here

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 7, Portugal
programme.desc: The competition continues in Portugal with 6 events and thousands of spectators

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 8, Croatia
programme.desc: Episode 8 takes place in 36 degree heat in Croatia and sees the return of Krzysztof Radzikowski after a 2 month absence due to injury

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 9, Poland
programme.desc: SCL returns to Poland with 12 athletes all battling for the number one title

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 10, Hungary
programme.desc: The 10th stage takes place in Hungary and features new super talent!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 11, Zambia
programme.desc: The first ever SCL in Zambia! The athletes get to take in some of the stunning sights and go on to do events such as Tyre Flip and Log Lift

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 12, Romania
programme.desc: The competition moves to Romania and for the first time this season the athletes compete in rainy conditions which make the events even tougher

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 13, Lithunia
programme.desc: The next stage of the competition takes place in Lithunia and world records are once again broken!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 14, Estonia
programme.desc: Episode 14 takes place in Estonia where drama and world records will be seen again

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 15, Malaysia (World Finals Part 1)
programme.desc: Taking place over 2 days in Malaysia, this is part 1 of the world finals of Strongman Champions League!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 16, Malaysia (World Finals Part 2)
programme.desc: Who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League - we find out who is crowned as world champion today in the second part of the final epsiode

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 1, Norway
programme.desc: Across seven rivers, through mountains and forests, 12 strongmen go to toughest places to find out who is strongest Viking in the World and open a new season of Strongman champions league for 2015. Events like the Hercules Hold, Yoke Race and pulling a real Viking ship are some of the ingredients of this fantastic show.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 2, Germany
programme.desc: The second stage of Strongman champions league will be hosted in Germany, by FIBO - the leading international trade show for fitness, wellness and health worldwide with 300,000 visitors in four days. Special implements like the biggest log in the world or the special Bavarian stone lift are not only a challenge, but also an opportunity for new personal, national and world records.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 3, Holland
programme.desc: Holland is hosting 12 different countries with 14 of the strongest men in the world for the third stage of the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 4, Finland
programme.desc: Zydrunas Savickas, one of strongest people on earth is in this competition which has attracted the attention of the audience in the battle for the title of strongest man in Finland. The next round of SCL is in Bulgaria.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 5, Bulgaria
programme.desc: The next stage of the competition is in Bulgaria where Ervin Katona (SCL World Champion 2012) will compete for the last time.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 6, Latvia
programme.desc: Krzysztof Radzikowski, the leader in the league will fight hard to keep Dainis Zageris off from the title and to gather another 25 ranking points in this next stage in Latvia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 7, Croatia
programme.desc: The competition sees a close battle with a new world record in overhead dumbbell and close finishes throughout the day. This stage is in Croatia, in a city over 1700 years old, steeped in Roman tradition and history, the athletes arrive for the truck pull after a picturesque boat ride on the Adriatic Sea.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 8, Poland
programme.desc: We are now half way through the SCL 2015 and getting closer to the grand world finals in Turkey. The eighth stage is in Poland, the home country of the current leader Krzysztof Radzikowski.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 9, Austria
programme.desc: In this stage we go into the mountains of Austria to find out through six grueling events who is the strongest in the land of Alps. Martin Wildauer, current World Champion 2014 and Austrian local is competing alongside Zageris, Radzikowski, Belsak and many others.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 10, Romania
programme.desc: The 10th stage of this year's competition in Strongman Champions League is held in the Romanian city of Sibiu where the 12 strongmen continue to compete for the title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 11, World Log Lift Championship
programme.desc: The 11th stage is the SCL Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. In this championship, each competitor must lift three different weights overhead. Zydrunas Savickas is the current world record holder in the Log Lift.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 12, Lithuania
programme.desc: This next episode of the Strongman Champions League is hosted in Lithuania and sees us getting one step closer to the final.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 13, Portugal
programme.desc: The 13th stage of Strongman Champions League is in Maia, Portugal. The competition is at the “Powerexpo” – one of the best sport and fitness events in Portugal.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E14 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 14, Martinique
programme.desc: This stage is in Martinique and eight strongmen from all over the world will compete for the last chance to gather points before the world grand finals in December.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E15 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 15, Lightweight World Championship
programme.desc: A special World championship under the newcomers and lightweights in the Strongman world. Some of them will step from this to the heavyweights divisions.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E16 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 16, World Finals Turkey
programme.desc: After 15 outstanding competitions all over the world, finally we are here at the final competition of this year’s Strongman Champions League hosted in Turkey.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S05 : E10 GLORY 36 SuperFight Series
programme.desc: GLORY 36 SuperFight Series is headlined by Congolese-German light heavyweight Danyo Ilunga throwing down with the Netherlands' Michael Duut. Armenian-Belgian power puncher Harut Grigorian battles 23-year-old German prospect Danijel Solaja at welterweight in the can't miss co-headline bout. Plus two Super Bantamweight Grand Prix bouts. Muay Thai champion and MMA star Tiffany van Soest meets Canadian challenger Jessica Gladstone in one semifinal match-up, while 21-year-old Dutch prospect Isis Verbeek takes on undefeated Amel Dehby of France. The winners of each semifinal match-up will advance to the Grand Prix tournament final – the opening bout of GLORY: COLLISION.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S05 : E10 GLORY 36 Oberhausen
programme.desc: The Lightweight title is on the line as Sittichai looks to defend his title against #1 challenger Marat Grigorian. There is also a four-man lightweight tournament on the card.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S05 : E10 GLORY COLLISION
programme.desc: It's the fight everyone wants to see as GLORY Heavyweight champion, Rico Verhoeven takes on Badr Hari. Plus, the Welterweight title is on the line as Nieky Holzken meets Cedric Doumbé.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing

programme.desc: The GLORY 39 Superfight Series is headlined by a Lightweight title fight as champion Sittichai defends his crown against Dylan Salvador.

programme.sub-title: S06 : E03 GLORY 39 Brussels
programme.desc: Recently crowned champion Cedric Doumbe puts his title on the line against Yoann Kongolo who has beaten Doumbe twice before. Plus four featherweights compete in the GLORY 39 Featherweight tournament.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: This is heavyweight fighting at its best and bloodiest. Finnish muay thai champion Jarno Nurminen makes his mised martial art debut against Korean judo expert Sag Su Lee. And in one of the sport's best brawls, Roy Nelson goes toe-to-toe with Josh Curran.

programme.desc: President and CEO Giuseppe Marotta presents the 2026/2027 sports season alongside Nerazzurri head coach Cristian Chivu at the BPER Training Centre in Appiano Gentile.

programme.title: Off The Pitch | Fabio Fognini
programme.desc: Double-winner Fabio Fognini tells all in the fifth episode of Off The Pitch

programme.title: Pitchside Sound | Inter - Roma 1996/97
programme.desc: Relive historic Inter matches with the original pitchside audio so you don't miss a single detail!

programme.title: Every Goal Season 2005 06
programme.desc: Eyes focused on all the goals scored by the Inter champions in all competitions of the season. Which one moved you the most?

programme.title: Goal Gallery | Cruz
programme.desc: Every goal is an emotion, an explosion of Nerazzurri pride. A collection that tells the story of those who have made their mark wearing the Inter jersey. A journey through nets, passion, and belonging.

programme.title: Coppa Italia | Como - Inter | 2025/2026 - Semi-Final 1St Half
programme.desc: Nerazzurri claw back from 0-2 down in a stunning turnaround: a Calhanoglu brace and an 89th-minute winner from Sucic seal the comeback.

programme.desc: Nerazzurri claw back from 0-2 down in a stunning turnaround: a Calhanoglu brace and an 89th-minute winner from Sucic seal the comeback.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E58 Monza Rally Show
programme.desc: Three days of adrenaline and drifting action – the Monza Rally Show is a top-class motorsports event. Competitors in this event include the biggest names from all areas of motorsports who are to master 9 different challenges.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 Pickups
programme.desc: In Europe pickups are mainly used commercially. In the US these trucks are as common as SUVs. We compared the Volkswagen Amarok to the Toyota Hilux. Also: current US pickups, the Chevrolet Colorado and GMC's Sierra and Canyon.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S02 : E15 Powerful Estate Wagons
programme.desc: Station Wagons like the Volvo V60 Polestar aren't just family vans anymore but basically very roomy sports cars. Mercedes followed a more luxurious approach with their E43 AMG T model. And: the ultimate powerhouse station wagon, the Audi RS6.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E172 Prestige Coupes
programme.desc: Mercedes‘ S-Class Coupe is a real masterpiece. We explored what the S 63 AMG Coupe has to offer in comparison to the Bentley Continental and the Rolls Royce Wraith.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E192 Gran Turismo
programme.desc: One of the most beautiful GT car models is the Maserati Gran Turismo S. With the 570GT, English sports car manufacturer McLaren introduced its first grand tourer. It was supposed to be the most comfortable but still very sporty McLaren.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E42 The Most Beautiful Supercars
programme.desc: Super sports cars attract attention everywhere and quicken the pulse of car fans worldwide. We present our Top 10 of the most beautiful supercars.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 The Very Best Car Nicknames
programme.desc: Finding the right name for a car model often poses a challenge for the manufacturers' marketing departments. We take a look at our Top 10 of the best car names.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 BMW X6M vs Nissan Patrol
programme.desc: At Jumeirah Beach in Dubai, car owners can have their souped-up vehicles judged in three categories and win an overnight stay at the Sofitel Hotel. This time, a BMW X6M, a Ford F250 and a Nissan Patrol are in the running.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Lamborghini Aventador vs GMC Chevrolet
programme.desc: The "Walk" at JBR in Dubai is the venue for our competition, as far as fancy and luxurious cars from all over the Middle East are concerned. This time, a Lamborghini Aventador and a GMC Chevrolet are among the participants.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Ford Mustang vs Chevy Corvette
programme.desc: Car lovers from the Middle East present their vehicles at the Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. There is a weekend at the hotel to be won. A Ford Mustang and a limited edition Chevrolet Corvette are up for judging this time.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E119 Open-top Top Dog
programme.desc: A cruise over the Alps to Italy in a Maserati GranCabrio MC. In addition: a Brit with a fiery temperament, the Jaguar XK-RS convertible with 550 hp. And: Mercedes AMG's SL models, uncompromising performance.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E153 Car Jewels
programme.desc: The Mulsanne, Bentley's flagship car, provides luxury like in a first class hotel and elegance like an Armani suit. In addition: the Rolls-Royce Ghost. And: the high-tech coupe by Mercedes, the S 63 AMG with its V8 twin-turbo engine.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Episode 14
programme.desc: The fourth race of the VLN season is usually regarded as a dress rehearsal for the 24-hour race. For the top teams and best drivers it is the last opportunity for a really thorough test.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Episode 22
programme.desc: At the Nuerburgring Patrick chased a 12-cylinder Aston Martin Zagato down the track. Also on the show: a Hummer, a Renault Clio and a Frenchman in a Ferrari.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Alarm in the Ski Resort
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes are still at the ski resort, preparing a spectacular stunt involving a station wagon that is catapulted 50 meters high into the air. The high-flying car is supposed to crash into another car that is placed on a meadow.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 The Very First Time
programme.desc: The team is shooting a car rollover. Stunt coordinator Carl wants to go all out. He adds an exciting shootout to the mix. Also, he has a surprise for his boss. During the rollover he wants him to sit in the passenger seat, for the very first time.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Chevy Camaro vs Mercedes SLS AMG
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi invite car freaks from the Middle East to show off their souped-up vehicles on the "Walk" at Jumeirah Beach in Dubai. In this episode, a Chevrolet Camaro competes against a Mercedes SLS AMG.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Lexus GSF vs McLaren MP4-12C
programme.desc: The competition for the coolest souped-up cars in the Middle East continues. The prize is an overnight stay for two at the Sofitel Jumeirah Beach. This time, the spotlight is on a Lexus GSF, a Ford Mustang and a McLaren MP4-12C.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E195 From Dusk till Dawn
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 Turbo S Cabriolet is a timelessly elegant all-rounder and nevertheless more of a cruiser than a sports vehicle. In direct contrast, the Rolls Royce Dawn provides luxury and elegance at a new level.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E193 Open Air Feeling
programme.desc: The Mercedes-AMG C43 was supposed to act as the entry-level model to the brand's cabriolet world. With the 718 Boxster, Porsche offers a convertible at a competitive price as well.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 MG TC
programme.desc: The MG TC is a sporty, but also extremely spartan car with technology from the late 1940s. We accompanied the owner of a MG TC on his way to pass the TÜV, the German technical certification test.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Melkus RS 1000
programme.desc: The Melkus RS 1000 is considered the Ferrari of the East. The extremely flat two-seater with its mid-engine and gullwing doors was the only real sports car ever built in the GDR and is hardly known outside the former country's borders.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E25 Innovations
programme.desc: Duel of the city runabouts: the Audi A1 Quattro versus the Renault Clio RS. Also: the Morgan Plus 8 roadster with its combination of retro design and modern tech. And: the Swiss think-tank Rinspeed's vision of tomorrow's big city traffic.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Crazy Rides
programme.desc: In 2006, Peraves presented their MonoTracer, a cabin motorcycle with immense power and an electric drive option. Also: the three-wheeler Carver One combines motorcycle and car specs. And: two unusual rides, a Mini hot rod and the Reliant Rialto.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E45 Sporty All Wheelers
programme.desc: At the Monza Rally Show, motorsport superstars compete against each other on the legendary Formula 1 race track. Also: the powerful and sporty Mercedes GLE Coupé is the answer to the BMW X6. And: the facelift of the Nissan Juke.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Mercedes ML 63 AMG
programme.desc: We put the Porsche Cayenne Turbo S and the Mercedes ML 63 AMG to the test. Also: the final round of the truck trial race at the Camp4fun at the Nürburgring in Germany. And: General Motors' new luxury SUV, the Cadillac SRX.

programme.title: Made in ...
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 BMW motorcycle production
programme.desc: Sheer Driving Pleasure: That’s how BMW advertises not only its cars, but its motorcycles as well. For more than 40 years, these 2-wheelers have stood for maximum comfort, quality, and safety.

programme.title: Made in ...
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Mechatronics
programme.desc: Pleidelsheim, near Stuttgart. The Mechatronik company specialises in classics from Mercedes. Since 1997, engineers, electricians and mechanics has dedicated itself to the restoration and refinement of classic models.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Walter Röhrl
programme.desc: One cannot talk about rally sports without mentioning the name Walter Röhrl. From an early age, Röhrl showed his talent in rally sports and won the European, World and other international rally championships several times in his career.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Ferruccio Lamborghini
programme.desc: In 1964, Ferruccio Lamborghini set himself the goal to build the best sports cars in the world, a bold move, being located only a few kilometers from Ferrari.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S05 : E07 All-Wheel Vans
programme.desc: With the 2 Series Gran Tourer all-wheel van, like, for example, the 220 xDrive, BMW wants families to experience the joy of driving. The Seat Alhambra offers a practical sliding door and a lot of space in the back. Also: the luxurious V-Class by Mercedes.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Wildly through the desert
programme.desc: BMW and the German racing team X-Raid take part in the Dakar Rally with a transformed Mini Countryman. Also: the Mercedes G63 AMG 6x6, a 6-wheel off-road monster. And: the Kia Sportage feels both at home in the rocky terrain of Sicily and the city.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E30 Best-selling sporty Coupés
programme.desc: Coupes are still bestsellers. In the Audi RS7 the Mercedes CLS 63 AMG and BMW M6 Gran Coupe got a new challenger. In addition: is the BMW 4 Series Coupe a spin-off of the successful 3 Series model? And: the rather unusual Hyundai Veloster.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E33 Sportscars for the Masses
programme.desc: The Ford Mustang has been an icon for decades. What makes this car so special? In addition: the Nissan 370 Z Nismo is half as expensive as a Porsche 911, but its power is on par with the German flagship. And: the 7th generation Volkswagen Golf GTI and R.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 KTM 990 Adventure
programme.desc: The big KTM 990 Adventure is Austria’s answer to BMW's bestselling R 1200 GS. Is KTM's allrounder for streets, gravel roads and long distance travels a worthy opponent for the dominating Bavarian bike? Also: travel enduros are put to the test as we accompany two German adventurers on their 31-day, 5800-kilometre bike tour through Thailand, Laos and Cambodia.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 Enduro Park Hechlingen
programme.desc: The BMW Enduro Park Hechlingen in Bavaria offers off-road driving pleasure both for beginners and pros alike on 26 hectares. We take a look at what this exciting place has to offer for enduro enthusiasts. Also: what does the inexpensive Hyosung ST 700 i from South Korea have to offer? And: the big-wheeled scooter from Taiwan, the Kymco People GT 300i.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E42 Unique Models and Million-Sellers
programme.desc: Aston Martin usually triggers thoughts of James Bond and expensive sports cars. But the British luxury brand also offers sedans like the 1976 Aston Martin Lagonda Shooting Brake. An Aston fan turned his into to a station wagon.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E53 Royal Cars
programme.desc: The Bentley S2 Continental Flying Spur, a drivers' car with Rolls Royce genes. In addition: Joseph Stalin's ZIS 110, a Soviet reverse-engineered Packard Super Eight. And: the Rolls Royce Silver Wraith, the British luxury vehicle for the Belgian king.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E68 Fresh Air Experience
programme.desc: Smart offers its iconic city car with a convertible option. The Mini cabriolet is bigger and provides room for four people. When it comes to roadster feeling, the Mazda MX-5 is on top of the list. We took a closer look at these three open-top contenders.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E38 Offroad Dinosaurs
programme.desc: For more than 60 years the Land Rover Defender fought its way through the roughest terrain all over the world. Also: the Mercedes-Benz G-Series, the German off-road all-purpose tool. And: the Russian icon Lada Niva was re-named as Taiga.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E184 Big in US
programme.desc: They are big, heavy and embody the American way of driving: luxury SUVs like the Cadillac Escalade, classic pick-up trucks like the iconic Ford F-150 or Uber pick-ups like the Dodge RAM.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E167 Porsche GT3 Streetracer
programme.desc: How do you top the already in many ways superior iconic Porsche 911? You come up with the GT3. It's the ultimate melange of road suitability and race track compatibility. And Porsche's RS model is even more intense.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Fastest Cars in the World
programme.desc: Speed has always been one of the most important criteria when it comes to owning or driving a car. We show you our top 10 list of the fastest cars in the world.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 The Ugliest Cars
programme.desc: The world of automobiles is also full of contrasts. There are fast and slow, beautiful and less beautiful models. We present our top 10 ugliest cars in the world.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 The Oldest Car Manufacturers
programme.desc: The invention of the automobile dates back more than 100 years. But which manufacturers have been in the business the longest? We show the top 10 oldest car manufacturers.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 The Ten Slowest Cars
programme.desc: Cars are often defined by their speed, but we chose to decelerate things and take a look at our top 10 selection of the most sluggish cars.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S02 : E26 Flip through a cola truck
programme.desc: Stunt man Dominik Kowalski is an expert for falls, drops and body stunts. Today, everything will be different as he is supposed to be the stunt car driver. His objective is to do a flip through a cola truck.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S02 : E24 Jump'n Crash
programme.desc: In this episode of Stunt Heroes, it's all about stunt driver Christoph Knobloch. He drives down a ramp and crashes into cars stacked on top of each other while several petrol barrels explode at the same time.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E157 Four Seatbelts for a Halleluja
programme.desc: The Porsche Panamera Turbo S is one of the most dynamic sedans in the world. In addition: the Jaguar XJR power sedan with a 550 hp V8 engine and Mercedes' extraordinary four-door coupe CLS 500.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E44 The Most Beautiful Convertibles
programme.desc: Convertibles are not only popular in summer and when the weather is nice. We present our top 10 most beautiful convertibles.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 The Most Expensive Production Cars
programme.desc: Everyone knows that vehicles made by hand or in small numbers can be extremely expensive. But that can also be true for production vehicles. Here are our top 10 most expensive production cars.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E195 From Dusk till Dawn
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 Turbo S Cabriolet is a timelessly elegant all-rounder and nevertheless more of a cruiser than a sports vehicle. In direct contrast, the Rolls Royce Dawn provides luxury and elegance at a new level.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E140 Porsche 911 Targa
programme.desc: Porsche decided to introduce an updated model of their iconic 911 Targa. In addition: it's pure open-top joy to drive Maserati's Gran Cabrio MC. And: the BMW M6 convertible in Munich.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E77 Audi R8 GT vs. Jaguar XKR
programme.desc: The ultimate competition: Aston Martin Virage vs. Jaguar XKR vs. Audi's R8 GT vs. Mercedes SLS. Also: Artega claims that their GT is a 'Porsche killer'. Is that so? And: Formula One champion Sebastian Vettel takes the Infinity FX50 to the test.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 Italian Design
programme.desc: In the 1980s the Lamborghini Countach and the Ferrari Testarossa were the epitomes of a perfect super sports car. In addition: the Aston Martin DB5 from "Goldfinger", the Alfa Romeo 6C 2500 SS and the Intermeccanica Italia Spyder.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E51 Classic Car Hybrids
programme.desc: The Apollo 3500 GT, Italian body art combined with an American V8. In addition: a firestarter in a Volkswagen body, the Karmann Ghia with a Porsche engine at the test track. And: the Reliant Scimitar with its 3-liter Ford engine.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Pedal to the metal
programme.desc: We sent Benedikt Weber to Finland, where he was introduced to handling a rally car on ice and snow by world rally champion Armin Schwarz. Also: high-tech in the automotive world at CES, the Consumer Electronics Show in Vegas. And: the Volvo R-Design.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E59 King of the ring
programme.desc: The Nürburgring Nordschleife is known as the toughest speedway in the world. Together with race driver Hans-Joachim Stuck we take a look at the history of this iconic race track as well as the events and record attempts that have been taking place there.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 All-Wheel All-Rounder
programme.desc: The versatile Volkswagen Caddy is both popular with craftspeople and families alike. With the Levorg, the Japanese manufacturer Subaru offers a functional all-terrain vehicle with plenty of room and agility. Also: the Audi A4 Allroad Quattro.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 The SUV Desert Challenge
programme.desc: Offroad legend Duncan Barbour took a group of men to Oman in order to test the off-road capabilities of the Mercedes-Benz SUV models. Also: how does the Mercedes Benz GL, a 7-seater full-size luxury SUV, perform in the urban jungle of Dubai?

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 Triumph Speed Triple Carbon
programme.desc: Suzuki's all-rounder flagship, the V-Strom, underwent a rejuvenation treatment. Will the new V-Strom 650 be able to surpass its versatile predecessors? Also: does the use of carbon make sense in the manufacturing of motorcycles? And: a bike tour on the Deutsche Alpenstraße, the German Alpine Road, in the footsteps of Bavaria's fairy tale king Ludwig II.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E39 Triumph Tiger 800 XC
programme.desc: Let's take a trip to the British Isles. The Triumph Tiger 800 XC is a rather simple bike that at the same time provides a lot of excitement, especially thanks to its chassis and engine. We also take a tour through the Scottish highlands with the BMW R 1200 RT. And we present the Triumph Tiger 1050, the brand's response to competitors like the Ducati Multistrada, the BMW GS and the KTM 990 SM-T.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E182 High Voltage
programme.desc: With its extreme power and performance the Croatian super car Rimac Concept One opened the door to an exciting new world. Also: the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG Coupe Electric Drive. And: Tesla's impressive Model S series.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E112 V8 Power
programme.desc: Modern vehicles like the BMW X6 M, the Mercedes-AMG E 63, Chrysler's Grand Cherokee SRT and the Audi S6 still rely on the classic concept of the V8 engine. We took a look at these examples of modern V8 power.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Episode 14
programme.desc: The fourth race of the VLN season is usually regarded as a dress rehearsal for the 24-hour race. For the top teams and best drivers it is the last opportunity for a really thorough test.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Episode 18
programme.desc: After the 24-hour race was over we left the Nuerburgring and moved to Büren, Germany, where the Raeder Motorsport company is based. They are famous for front-wheel drives with a great performance that put a lot of horsepower to the track.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E78 Maybach Excelero
programme.desc: Fast, expensive and a one-off – the Maybach Exelero. Also: the Custom GT, a super sports car fueled with LPG. And: the new Porsche 911.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E79 Infinity FX50
programme.desc: The evolutionary history of the Infinity FX50, Sebastian Vettel Edition. Also: the Porsche GT2 RS, the most expensive and fastest serial 911 of all times. And: the McLaren MP4 12C GT3, one of the fastest cars in the world.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E58 Monza Rally Show
programme.desc: Three days of adrenaline and drifting action – the Monza Rally Show is a top-class motorsports event. Competitors in this event include the biggest names from all areas of motorsports who are to master 9 different challenges.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 Pickups
programme.desc: In Europe pickups are mainly used commercially. In the US these trucks are as common as SUVs. We compared the Volkswagen Amarok to the Toyota Hilux. Also: current US pickups, the Chevrolet Colorado and GMC's Sierra and Canyon.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E172 Prestige Coupes
programme.desc: Mercedes‘ S-Class Coupe is a real masterpiece. We explored what the S 63 AMG Coupe has to offer in comparison to the Bentley Continental and the Rolls Royce Wraith.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E32 V8 Bangers
programme.desc: The V8 engine: strong, bursting with power and blessed with a sound that gives you goose bumps. The British TVR 5000's engine comes from the Ford Mustang, and the car's overall low weight promises an exhilarating driving experience.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 AMC Cobra Pacer
programme.desc: The rare AMC Pacer featured in the movie Wayne's World is a real eye catcher. This car caught the attention of famous German music manager Andreas Laesker.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E54 Hybrids
programme.desc: Some people claim that hybrid cars are neither fish nor fowl. Audi's reaction was the A3 e-tron. The all-electric BMW i3 went a step further, offering a range extender. Also: the Mitsubishi Outlander, the first plug-in hybrid SUV in the world.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E30 Best-selling sporty Coupés
programme.desc: Coupes are still bestsellers. In the Audi RS7 the Mercedes CLS 63 AMG and BMW M6 Gran Coupe got a new challenger. In addition: is the BMW 4 Series Coupe a spin-off of the successful 3 Series model? And: the rather unusual Hyundai Veloster.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Rally Year 1972 - A Ford success story
programme.desc: The International Championship for Manufacturers was a rally series which was run from 1970 to 1972. Car manufacturers such as Porsche, Renault, Opel and Ford took part in this competition, with Ford having an exceptionally successful year in 1972.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 German Touring Car Championship 1992
programme.desc: The Deutsche Tourenwagen Meisterschaft was one of the most important racing series in German motorsports. It was difficult, tough and well-known for its die-hard battles between the international competitors. We present the highlights of the 1992 race.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E49 Bizzarrini 5300 GT
programme.desc: Giotto Bizzarrini was the creator of the famous Ferrari GTO, but after arguments with his employer he left Ferrari early. To get back at Ferrari, Bizzarrini decided to create his own sports car: the Bizzarrini GT 5300.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E58 Luxurious coupes with 12 cylinders
programme.desc: The 1973 Jaguar XJC's V12 engine purrs like a kitten and growls like a wild cat. In addition: the high-tech luxury coupe BMW 850. And: in the 1960s the Ferrari 250 GTE wrote racing history. We took this sportster to the test track.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 German Rallye Championship 1983
programme.desc: Since its premiere in 1970 the Deutsche Rallye Meisterschaft has been one of the most popular motorsports series. In the 1983 competition Opel's Manta, Kadett and Ascona sports models celebrated exceptional successes.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Audi Quattro - The new Dimension, 1985
programme.desc: In 1985 Audi made their impressive mark in motorsports with the Quattro. With its 4x4 drive this model impressed the audience and shocked the competition alike and ushered in a new era in rally sports.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Alois Ruf
programme.desc: Alois Ruf is the founder of a small, but well-known car manufacturing company in Bavaria that specialises in building their own vision of street legal super sports cars on the foundation of Porsche bodys.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Henry Ford
programme.desc: In the early 20th century, automotive pioneer Henry Ford revolutionized the world of car manufacturing with the foundation of the Ford Motor Company and his introduction of the assembly line technique in his factory and the iconic Model T.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Rally Sport 1983
programme.desc: In 1983 Audi introduced the Quattro 4x4 drive to the rally world, adding a new dimension to rally racing. The races became tougher and more brutal. The strain on drivers, vehicles and mechanics alike was extremely intense.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Rallye Sport 1984
programme.desc: In Europe and Africa in 1984, the rally veterans and drifting artists, Hannu Mikkola, Walter Roehrl, Bjoern Waldegaard, Marku Alen and the rally amazon, Michele Mouton, fought fiercly for the World Championship title.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 50 Years Jaguar E-Type
programme.desc: A legend celebrates its 50th anniversary. In 1961 the Jaguar E-Type was shown for the first time at the Geneva International Motor Show.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Mercedes 300 SL Gullwing
programme.desc: The Mercedes 300SL might be the most exciting sports car of the post-war era. It was even named sports car of the century. Hans Kleissl owns one of the world's leading repair and restoration shops for SL models.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 MG TC
programme.desc: The MG TC is a sporty, but also extremely spartan car with technology from the late 1940s. We accompanied the owner of a MG TC on his way to pass the TÜV, the German technical certification test.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Melkus RS 1000
programme.desc: The Melkus RS 1000 is considered the Ferrari of the East. The extremely flat two-seater with its mid-engine and gullwing doors was the only real sports car ever built in the GDR and is hardly known outside the former country's borders.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E25 Innovations
programme.desc: Duel of the city runabouts: the Audi A1 Quattro versus the Renault Clio RS. Also: the Morgan Plus 8 roadster with its combination of retro design and modern tech. And: the Swiss think-tank Rinspeed's vision of tomorrow's big city traffic.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Crazy Rides
programme.desc: In 2006, Peraves presented their MonoTracer, a cabin motorcycle with immense power and an electric drive option. Also: the three-wheeler Carver One combines motorcycle and car specs. And: two unusual rides, a Mini hot rod and the Reliant Rialto.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E45 Sporty All Wheelers
programme.desc: At the Monza Rally Show, motorsport superstars compete against each other on the legendary Formula 1 race track. Also: the powerful and sporty Mercedes GLE Coupé is the answer to the BMW X6. And: the facelift of the Nissan Juke.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Mercedes ML 63 AMG
programme.desc: We put the Porsche Cayenne Turbo S and the Mercedes ML 63 AMG to the test. Also: the final round of the truck trial race at the Camp4fun at the Nürburgring in Germany. And: General Motors' new luxury SUV, the Cadillac SRX.

programme.title: Made in ...
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 BMW motorcycle production
programme.desc: Sheer Driving Pleasure: That’s how BMW advertises not only its cars, but its motorcycles as well. For more than 40 years, these 2-wheelers have stood for maximum comfort, quality, and safety.

programme.title: Made in ...
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Mechatronics
programme.desc: Pleidelsheim, near Stuttgart. The Mechatronik company specialises in classics from Mercedes. Since 1997, engineers, electricians and mechanics has dedicated itself to the restoration and refinement of classic models.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Walter Röhrl
programme.desc: One cannot talk about rally sports without mentioning the name Walter Röhrl. From an early age, Röhrl showed his talent in rally sports and won the European, World and other international rally championships several times in his career.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Ferruccio Lamborghini
programme.desc: In 1964, Ferruccio Lamborghini set himself the goal to build the best sports cars in the world, a bold move, being located only a few kilometers from Ferrari.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S05 : E07 All-Wheel Vans
programme.desc: With the 2 Series Gran Tourer all-wheel van, like, for example, the 220 xDrive, BMW wants families to experience the joy of driving. The Seat Alhambra offers a practical sliding door and a lot of space in the back. Also: the luxurious V-Class by Mercedes.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Wildly through the desert
programme.desc: BMW and the German racing team X-Raid take part in the Dakar Rally with a transformed Mini Countryman. Also: the Mercedes G63 AMG 6x6, a 6-wheel off-road monster. And: the Kia Sportage feels both at home in the rocky terrain of Sicily and the city.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E30 Best-selling sporty Coupés
programme.desc: Coupes are still bestsellers. In the Audi RS7 the Mercedes CLS 63 AMG and BMW M6 Gran Coupe got a new challenger. In addition: is the BMW 4 Series Coupe a spin-off of the successful 3 Series model? And: the rather unusual Hyundai Veloster.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E33 Sportscars for the Masses
programme.desc: The Ford Mustang has been an icon for decades. What makes this car so special? In addition: the Nissan 370 Z Nismo is half as expensive as a Porsche 911, but its power is on par with the German flagship. And: the 7th generation Volkswagen Golf GTI and R.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 KTM 990 Adventure
programme.desc: The big KTM 990 Adventure is Austria’s answer to BMW's bestselling R 1200 GS. Is KTM's allrounder for streets, gravel roads and long distance travels a worthy opponent for the dominating Bavarian bike? Also: travel enduros are put to the test as we accompany two German adventurers on their 31-day, 5800-kilometre bike tour through Thailand, Laos and Cambodia.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 Enduro Park Hechlingen
programme.desc: The BMW Enduro Park Hechlingen in Bavaria offers off-road driving pleasure both for beginners and pros alike on 26 hectares. We take a look at what this exciting place has to offer for enduro enthusiasts. Also: what does the inexpensive Hyosung ST 700 i from South Korea have to offer? And: the big-wheeled scooter from Taiwan, the Kymco People GT 300i.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Episode 21
programme.desc: In this episode, we focused on Phoenix Racing, the successful team from the Eifel Region that rocked the DTM.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Episode 16
programme.desc: In this episode we invite you to witness the progress of driver Uwe Nittle as he got ready for qualifying at the Truck Grand Prix.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E42 Unique Models and Million-Sellers
programme.desc: Aston Martin usually triggers thoughts of James Bond and expensive sports cars. But the British luxury brand also offers sedans like the 1976 Aston Martin Lagonda Shooting Brake. An Aston fan turned his into to a station wagon.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E53 Royal Cars
programme.desc: The Bentley S2 Continental Flying Spur, a drivers' car with Rolls Royce genes. In addition: Joseph Stalin's ZIS 110, a Soviet reverse-engineered Packard Super Eight. And: the Rolls Royce Silver Wraith, the British luxury vehicle for the Belgian king.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E68 Fresh Air Experience
programme.desc: Smart offers its iconic city car with a convertible option. The Mini cabriolet is bigger and provides room for four people. When it comes to roadster feeling, the Mazda MX-5 is on top of the list. We took a closer look at these three open-top contenders.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E38 Offroad Dinosaurs
programme.desc: For more than 60 years the Land Rover Defender fought its way through the roughest terrain all over the world. Also: the Mercedes-Benz G-Series, the German off-road all-purpose tool. And: the Russian icon Lada Niva was re-named as Taiga.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E184 Big in US
programme.desc: They are big, heavy and embody the American way of driving: luxury SUVs like the Cadillac Escalade, classic pick-up trucks like the iconic Ford F-150 or Uber pick-ups like the Dodge RAM.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E167 Porsche GT3 Streetracer
programme.desc: How do you top the already in many ways superior iconic Porsche 911? You come up with the GT3. It's the ultimate melange of road suitability and race track compatibility. And Porsche's RS model is even more intense.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Fastest Cars in the World
programme.desc: Speed has always been one of the most important criteria when it comes to owning or driving a car. We show you our top 10 list of the fastest cars in the world.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 The Ugliest Cars
programme.desc: The world of automobiles is also full of contrasts. There are fast and slow, beautiful and less beautiful models. We present our top 10 ugliest cars in the world.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 The Ten Slowest Cars
programme.desc: Cars are often defined by their speed, but we chose to decelerate things and take a look at our top 10 selection of the most sluggish cars.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S02 : E26 Flip through a cola truck
programme.desc: Stunt man Dominik Kowalski is an expert for falls, drops and body stunts. Today, everything will be different as he is supposed to be the stunt car driver. His objective is to do a flip through a cola truck.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S02 : E24 Jump'n Crash
programme.desc: In this episode of Stunt Heroes, it's all about stunt driver Christoph Knobloch. He drives down a ramp and crashes into cars stacked on top of each other while several petrol barrels explode at the same time.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E157 Four Seatbelts for a Halleluja
programme.desc: The Porsche Panamera Turbo S is one of the most dynamic sedans in the world. In addition: the Jaguar XJR power sedan with a 550 hp V8 engine and Mercedes' extraordinary four-door coupe CLS 500.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E44 The Most Beautiful Convertibles
programme.desc: Convertibles are not only popular in summer and when the weather is nice. We present our top 10 most beautiful convertibles.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 The Most Expensive Production Cars
programme.desc: Everyone knows that vehicles made by hand or in small numbers can be extremely expensive. But that can also be true for production vehicles. Here are our top 10 most expensive production cars.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E195 From Dusk till Dawn
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 Turbo S Cabriolet is a timelessly elegant all-rounder and nevertheless more of a cruiser than a sports vehicle. In direct contrast, the Rolls Royce Dawn provides luxury and elegance at a new level.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E140 Porsche 911 Targa
programme.desc: Porsche decided to introduce an updated model of their iconic 911 Targa. In addition: it's pure open-top joy to drive Maserati's Gran Cabrio MC. And: the BMW M6 convertible in Munich.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E77 Audi R8 GT vs. Jaguar XKR
programme.desc: The ultimate competition: Aston Martin Virage vs. Jaguar XKR vs. Audi's R8 GT vs. Mercedes SLS. Also: Artega claims that their GT is a 'Porsche killer'. Is that so? And: Formula One champion Sebastian Vettel takes the Infinity FX50 to the test.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E59 German Race Car Classics
programme.desc: We present to you historic image and film documents from the Porsche 550 RS Spyder. And: how the Audi Quattro shocked its competitors with its driving dynamics.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E44 Arabella Classics
programme.desc: The Arabella Classics is one of the most exclusive classic car rallies in Europe. We took part in a rare BMW 502. Plus: The Lamborghini Diablo GT and the Volkswagen Bus T2 Westfalia are put to the test.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E39 Pony Cars - the American Way of Drive
programme.desc: In 1964, the first Ford Mustang saw the light of day, and its sales surpassed all expectations. Following this iconic car's 50th anniversary we explored if the contemporary Mustang was still the benchmark in its class, compared to its competitors.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Moment of Force
programme.desc: Dennis Rostek races the Mathilda Racing GT-R1 at the Nürburgring Nordschleife. Also: the two sons of racing legend Hans-Joachim Stuck take the BMW 550d to the test track. And: could the Volkswagen Golf 7 be a suitable Bond car?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E160 Road Stars
programme.desc: The Silvretta Hochalpenstrasse in Austria is the ideal playground for the lightweight power packs Lotus Elise and Roding Roadster. Also: the elegant but still very powerful Porsche 911 Targa 4S.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E121 On Patrol with the Dubai Police Supercars
programme.desc: The Dubai police's fleet of patrol cars includes a Chevrolet Camaro, a Lamborghini Aventador, a Bentley GT, a Ferrari FF and more. For the first time ever, their Special Cars Unit allowed a TV crew a glimpse behind the curtain.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Episode 19
programme.desc: The roaring sounds of engines and exhausts usually dominate the Nuerburgring, but we focused on something a bit quieter this time. How about taking part in a 15 mile bike ride around the ring, or perhaps a 16 mile run?

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Episode 21
programme.desc: In this episode, we focused on Phoenix Racing, the successful team from the Eifel Region that rocked the DTM.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 BMW X6M vs Nissan Patrol
programme.desc: At Jumeirah Beach in Dubai, car owners can have their souped-up vehicles judged in three categories and win an overnight stay at the Sofitel Hotel. This time, a BMW X6M, a Ford F250 and a Nissan Patrol are in the running.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Lamborghini Aventador vs GMC Chevrolet
programme.desc: The "Walk" at JBR in Dubai is the venue for our competition, as far as fancy and luxurious cars from all over the Middle East are concerned. This time, a Lamborghini Aventador and a GMC Chevrolet are among the participants.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E103 Asian Bestsellers
programme.desc: The Lexus IS-F, Nissan's GTR and Juke R and the Infiniti FX 50 are rather exotic models. Not only the futuristic design but also the performance of these Asian power packs made European car manufacturers quiver in their boots.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E141 Jaguar RS
programme.desc: Jaguar succeeded in finding new confidence and challenging their competitors with models like the XF-RS, XK-RS and F-Type. We took a look at the iconic British brand's latest developments.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Ford Mustang vs Chevy Corvette
programme.desc: Car lovers from the Middle East present their vehicles at the Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. There is a weekend at the hotel to be won. A Ford Mustang and a limited edition Chevrolet Corvette are up for judging this time.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Mercedes SLS vs Audi R8
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi once again invite the owners of the most extraordinary cars to Dubai, where they award points for speed, style and sound. This time, they will be joined by a limited edition Mercedes SLS and an Audi R8.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Episode 22
programme.desc: At the Nuerburgring Patrick chased a 12-cylinder Aston Martin Zagato down the track. Also on the show: a Hummer, a Renault Clio and a Frenchman in a Ferrari.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Episode 20
programme.desc: At the old-timer grand prix at the Nuerburgring you for example can see the Mercedes S with 160 horsepower that lead Rudolf Caracciola to victory in the 1927 opening race.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E32 V8 Bangers
programme.desc: The V8 engine: strong, bursting with power and blessed with a sound that gives you goose bumps. The British TVR 5000's engine comes from the Ford Mustang, and the car's overall low weight promises an exhilarating driving experience.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 AMC Cobra Pacer
programme.desc: The rare AMC Pacer featured in the movie Wayne's World is a real eye catcher. This car caught the attention of famous German music manager Andreas Laesker.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E54 Hybrids
programme.desc: Some people claim that hybrid cars are neither fish nor fowl. Audi's reaction was the A3 e-tron. The all-electric BMW i3 went a step further, offering a range extender. Also: the Mitsubishi Outlander, the first plug-in hybrid SUV in the world.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E30 Best-selling sporty Coupés
programme.desc: Coupes are still bestsellers. In the Audi RS7 the Mercedes CLS 63 AMG and BMW M6 Gran Coupe got a new challenger. In addition: is the BMW 4 Series Coupe a spin-off of the successful 3 Series model? And: the rather unusual Hyundai Veloster.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Rally Year 1972 - A Ford success story
programme.desc: The International Championship for Manufacturers was a rally series which was run from 1970 to 1972. Car manufacturers such as Porsche, Renault, Opel and Ford took part in this competition, with Ford having an exceptionally successful year in 1972.

programme.sub-title: S09 : E09 FailFactory | Wild World
programme.desc: Being cute and cuddley doesn't exempt you from fails!

programme.title: FailFactory
programme.sub-title: S09 : E10 FailFactory | Wild World of Sports
programme.desc: It doesn't take much to fail on the field!

programme.title: FailFactory

programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 FailArmy Now | Bride Goes Down
programme.desc: What do brides, surfers and selfies have in common? They're all in this episode of FAILARMY NOW.

programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 FailArmy Now | Breaking Glass

programme.desc: What do Dumb friends, Free agents and Area 51 have in common? They're all in this episode of FAILARMY NOW.

programme.desc: The best of the worst for November '20.

programme.title: FailArmy 250 Years of Freedumb
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 FailArmy 250 Years of Freedumb
programme.desc: Life, liberty, and the pursuit of fails! Celebrate the 4th of July in true FailArmy style.

programme.title: Monster Jam Replay
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Paycom Center - Oklahoma City, OK
programme.desc: The roar of 12,000-pound titans descends upon the Paycom Center as Monster Jam Replay heads to Oklahoma City for Round 7 of the Arena Championship Series West. The energy is electric in "Loud City" as elite drivers face off in a high-stakes triple-threat of JCB Racing, the technical Two-Wheel Skills Challenge, and the chaotic brilliance of Freestyle. Witness a tense racing tiebreaker between Carson Williams and Ashley Sanford, and watch as Armando Castro and Tim Hall Jr. battle for critical series points. From Alex Bardin’s vertical precision in EarthShaker to Blake Granger’s powerful pursuit of a "redemption arc" in Monster Mutt Dalmatian, this episode captures the raw power and heart-pounding drama that only Monster Jam can deliver.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT
programme.desc: Feel the ground shake as the 2026 Monster Jam season kicks off with a high-octane battle in Salt Lake City. Watch legendary icons like Grave Digger and Megalodon go head-to-head against reigning World Finals champion Blake Granger in Monster Mutt Dalmatian and Armando Castro, who is celebrating 25 years of El Toro Loco. From the precision of the Two-Wheel Skills Challenge to the adrenaline-fueled chaos of a Freestyle finale packed with backflips and drifting, these elite athletes push 12,000-pound machines to their absolute limits.
